arts.ttl: Liverpool turn down massive £70m offer for 25-year-old – report
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly turned down a substantial £70 million offer from Saudi Pro League giants Al-Hilal for Uruguayan striker Darwin Nunez. Speculation about the forward’s future has been rife in recent days, with the Saudi side emerging as serious contenders for his signature. Initial reports linked Nunez with a move to AC Milan, who were […] The post Liverpool turn down massive £70m offer for 25-year-old – report appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: West Ham target Nottingham Forest star Taiwo Awoniyi, with Marseille forward Elye Wahi also being considered as Graham Potter bids to sign a striker amid injury crisis
arts.sum: The Hammers are in need of reinforcements up front but the move is not favoured by Forest as they would need a replacement.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds reject extraordinary Darwin Nunez offer
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez's Liverpool career could well be coming to an end with the Reds having received an extraordinary £70m offer for their Uruguayan striker. Anfield Watch is now reporting that the Reds have turned down a verbal offer in the region of £70million for Darwin from Al-Hilal.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest’s rise not a surprise given transfer spend, Arne Slot suggests
arts.sum: Forest have spent more than £360m since 2022 Slot adds: ‘It’s still an unbelievable accomplishment’ Arne Slot has said Nottingham Forest’s impressive rise should not come as a complete surprise given they have spent more money on transfers than Liverpool since winning promotion to the Premier League. The Liverpool head coach admits it is an “unbelievable accomplishment” for Nuno Espírito Santo and his team to sit third. Forest could reduce the gap on the Premier League leaders to three points with victory at the City Ground on Tuesday, albeit having played a game more. Continue reading...
